notes: v0.3.16: TikTok-style end card. Every video clip now ends with a 1.5-second JamSync logo animation (Gemini-generated, Veo watermark removed). When you press Stop, the compositor switches from cameras to the end card for 1.5s while the MediaRecorder is still capturing, so it appears seamlessly at the end of the clip with no re-encoding. End card audio is muted for now (needs WebAudio pipeline to mix). 307 KB bundled asset.
